query:
-- Game 1: Miami(FL) vs Purdue — 12:10 PM EDT = 9:10 AM PDT
-- Current DK NJ: Miami +7.5 -110 / Purdue -7.5 -110, O/U 147.5, ML +260/-325
-- Open: +7.5/-7.5, O/U 149.5, ML +300/-380
UPDATE games SET 
  startTimeEst = '09:10',
  awayBookSpread = 7.5, homeBookSpread = -7.5,
  bookTotal = 147.5,
  awayML = '+260', homeML = '-325',
  openAwaySpread = '7.5', openHomeSpread = '-7.5',
  openTotal = '149.5',
  openAwayML = '+300', openHomeML = '-380'
WHERE id = 1890035;

-- Game 2: Kentucky vs Iowa St — 6:45 PM EDT = 3:45 PM PDT (NOT 2:45 PM)
-- Wait — NCAA.com shows "SUN 2:45 PM ET" which is EDT. EDT = UTC-4, PDT = UTC-7. So 2:45 PM EDT = 11:45 AM PDT
-- Current DK NJ: Kentucky +4.5 -110 / Iowa St -4.5 -110, O/U 145.5, ML +170/-210
-- Open: +4.5/-4.5, O/U 146, ML +170/-210

  openAwaySpread = '4.5', openHomeSpread = '-4.5',
  openTotal = '146',
  openAwayML = '+170', openHomeML = '-210'
WHERE id = 1890039;
